goFlux 0.2.0
  • Reference

    Example gas measurements data from the Picarro G2508 gas analyzer

    imp.G2508.Rd

    Raw data from the Picarro G2508 greenhouse gas analyzer that has been processed by the function import.G2508 of this package.

    data(imp.G2508)

    Format

    An object of class "data.frame"

    Examples

    data(imp.G2508)
head(imp.G2508)
#>         DATE         TIME CO2dry_ppm CH4dry_ppb N2Odry_ppb N2Odry_30s_ppb
#> 1 2024-12-11 19:49:27.828   448.0339   2017.501  -77.91491      -82.13458
#> 2 2024-12-11 19:49:28.578   448.0668   2017.482  -77.91455      -81.86654
#> 3 2024-12-11 19:49:29.144   448.0917   2017.469  -78.77825      -81.61863
#> 4 2024-12-11 19:49:29.782   448.1177   2017.447  -79.74597      -81.41386
#> 5 2024-12-11 19:49:30.755   448.0758   2017.413  -81.22677      -81.26690
#> 6 2024-12-11 19:49:31.490   448.0442   2017.388  -81.22738      -81.15571
#>   NH3dry_ppb  H2O_ppm          POSIX.time CO2_prec CH4_prec N2O_prec NH3_prec
#> 1 0.13464825 756.0848 2024-12-11 19:49:27     0.24      0.3        5     0.16
#> 2 0.14452097 756.1589 2024-12-11 19:49:28     0.24      0.3        5     0.16
#> 3 0.15200186 756.2151 2024-12-11 19:49:29     0.24      0.3        5     0.16
#> 4 0.12192092 756.0236 2024-12-11 19:49:29     0.24      0.3        5     0.16
#> 5 0.07589888 755.7331 2024-12-11 19:49:30     0.24      0.3        5     0.16
#> 6 0.04114186 755.5136 2024-12-11 19:49:31     0.24      0.3        5     0.16
#>   H2O_prec
#> 1      500
#> 2      500
#> 3      500
#> 4      500
#> 5      500
#> 6      500
